name: Balloon Buddies    Flat Edition
description: Balloon Buddies: Flat Edition is a fun, colorful and kids-friendly HTML5 arcade game. Players tap or click on balloons to pop them before they escape the screen. The game starts simple, but balloon speed and frequency increase over time, creating an endless progression challenge. Cute balloon characters appear with different moods such as happy, naughty, angry and laughing, adding fun and variety. The game features a clean flat 2D art style, smooth animations, and bright visuals. It supports both mobile touch and desktop mouse controls and is safe, family-friendly, and suitable for all ages.
instructions: PC Mouse click to pop balloons Mobile Tap on balloons to pop
